zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Hampden於大約1148年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Simon de Hampden20歲，母親Sybil15歲。他於1170年之前與Lora Giffard在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Hampden于大约1148年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Simon de Hampden20岁，母亲Sybil15岁。他于1170年之前与Lora Giffard在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Hampden was born about 1148, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon de Hampden, was 20 and his mother, Sybil, was 15. He married Lora Giffard before 1170, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1204, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Hampden est né environ 1148, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Hampden, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sybil, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lora Giffard avant 1170, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1204, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Hampden um 1148 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Hampden 20 und seine Mutter Sybil 15. Er hat vor 1170 in Buckinghamshire, England Lora Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Hampden è nato il circa 1148 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon de Hampden, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Sybil, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lora Giffard prima del 1170, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1204, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Hampdenが約1148年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Simon de Hampdenは20歳，母Sybilは15歳であった。1170年以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでLora Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Hampden(이)가 대략 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Hampden(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1170년 이전 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Lora Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Hampden nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Hampden, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sybil, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lora Giffard antes 1170, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1204, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Hampden родился около 1148 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon de Hampden было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lora Giffard перед 1170 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1204 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Hampden nació aproximadamente 1148, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Hampden, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sybil, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Lora Giffard antes de 1170, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1204, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
